title: trichomanes lineolatum
intro: Trichomanes lineolatum, also known as the narrow-fruited stag's-hair fern, is a species of fern native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its delicate, linear fronds. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trichomanes lineolatum are thought to include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
